description_long: This object is a dark blue, box-shaped shopping cart with a lattice-patterned body made from what appears to be molded plastic. The sides feature a repeating diamond mesh design, providing both ventilation and structural integrity. There is a rectangular handle cutout at the top center of each side, allowing for easy gripping and carrying. The cart lacks visible wheels or a traditional metal frame, suggesting it is a lightweight, hand-carried basket rather than a wheeled cart. The surface is matte with a slightly textured finish, and there are no visible logos, branding, or additional compartments. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for carrying groceries or other items in an urban environment.
description: A dark blue, plastic shopping basket with a diamond lattice pattern and integrated handle cutouts, designed for hand carrying. The surface is matte and unbranded, with no visible wheels or child seat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the diamond lattice pattern and a rectangular handle cutout at the top center.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the same lattice pattern and handle cutout visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, again showing the lattice pattern and handle cutout, with no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other sides with the same pattern and handle.
attribute_wire_basket_pattern: Diamond lattice mesh pattern with medium density, uniform spacing, and moderate thickness, covering all sides of the basket.
attribute_handlebar_design: Rectangular cutout integrated into the upper edge of each side, molded from the same plastic as the body, with no additional grip material or ergonomic features.
attribute_wheel_configuration: No wheels are present; this is a hand-carried basket.
